name: Steamed Pears
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the pears and cut them in half. Remove the core and seeds.
2. Combine the sugar and water in a small pot. Bring to a boil until the sugar has completely dissolved. Allow it to cool slightly.
3. Put the pears, sugar-water mixture, and cinnamon into a shallow bowl.
4. Set up a steamer or put a rack into a wok or pan. Add about 2 inches of water and bring to a boil.
5. Place the bowl of pears into the steamer or onto the rack. Turn the heat down to a simmer and cover with a lid.
6. Slowly steam the pears for about 15-to-25 minutes, until they are tender (cooking time depends on pear ripeness).
7. When cooked, drain the liquid and cinnamon stick/bark into a small saucepan. Reduce the liquid to syrup by boiling it fast. Remove and discard the cinnamon stick.
8. Pour the syrup over the pears and serve immediately. Alternatively, let the mixture cool, cover with plastic wrap, and refrigerate until ready to serve.
